year.year: Type: Integer; Meaning: The year in which the data was recorded
year.year, age: Composite key: year + age uniquely identifies rows
year.year, aps_investigations: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigations for each year across all age groups gives the total number of investigations for that year

age.age: Type: String; Meaning: Age group of individuals
age.year, age: Composite key: year + age uniquely identifies rows
age.age, aps_investigations: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigations for each age group across all years gives the total number of investigations for that age group

aps_investigations.aps_investigations: Type: Integer; Meaning: Number of APS investigations conducted for the given age group in the specified year
aps_investigations.year, aps_investigations: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigations for each year across all age groups gives the total number of investigations for that year
aps_investigations.age, aps_investigations: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigations for each age group across all years gives the total number of investigations for that age group

year.year: Type: Integer; Meaning: The year in which the abuse case was reported
year.year, type_of_abuse: Composite key: year + type_of_abuse uniquely identifies the number of APS investigations for a specific type of abuse in a given year
year.year, aps_investigation: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigation for each year gives the total number of APS investigations in that year

type_of_abuse.type_of_abuse: Type: String; Meaning: The category of abuse reported
type_of_abuse.year, type_of_abuse: Composite key: year + type_of_abuse uniquely identifies the number of APS investigations for a specific type of abuse in a given year
type_of_abuse.type_of_abuse, aps_investigation: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigation for each type_of_abuse gives the total number of APS investigations for that type of abuse across all years

aps_investigation.aps_investigation: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of Adult Protective Services (APS) investigations conducted for the given type of abuse in the specified year
aps_investigation.year, aps_investigation: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigation for each year gives the total number of APS investigations in that year
aps_investigation.type_of_abuse, aps_investigation: Aggregation constraint: Sum of aps_investigation for each type_of_abuse gives the total number of APS investigations for that type of abuse across all years

operating_hours.operating_hours, aed_location_descriptio: Correlation: operating_hours often provides context for the accessibility of the AED as described in aed_location_description

house_number.house_number: Type: Integer; Meaning: House or building number of the address

consumer_numbers.consumer_numbers: Type: Integer; Meaning: The number of consumers or accounts checked in the given month

organisation_accounts.organisation_accounts, numbers_checked_m: Correlation: There is a moderate positive correlation between organization accounts and numbers checked, indicating that as the number of organization accounts increases, the volume of checks also tends to increase

account_type.account_type, net_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_amt for each account_type over quarters provides total amount in that account type

net_amt.net_amt: Type: Numeric; Meaning: Net amount in the specified CPF account for the given quarter
net_amt.account_type, net_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_amt for each account_type over quarters provides total amount in that account type
net_amt.quarter, net_amt: Trend: net_amt shows increasing trend over quarters for most account types

yr.yr: Type: Integer; Meaning: Year of the record
yr.yr, investment_schm_type: Composite key: yr + investment_schm_type uniquely identifies rows

investment_schm_type.investment_schm_type: Type: String; Meaning: Type of CPF investment scheme (either special account or ordinary account)
investment_schm_type.yr, investment_schm_type: Composite key: yr + investment_schm_type uniquely identifies rows
investment_schm_type.investment_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Correlation: net_wdl_amt varies based on the investment_schm_type, with special account generally having smaller absolute values compared to ordinary account

net_wdl_amt.net_wdl_amt: Type: Integer; Meaning: Net withdrawal amount in SGD for the given year and investment scheme type
net_wdl_amt.investment_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Correlation: net_wdl_amt varies based on the investment_schm_type, with special account generally having smaller absolute values compared to ordinary account

quarter.quarter: Type: String; Meaning: The financial quarter in the format YYYY-QX
quarter.quarter, housing_schm_type: Composite key: quarter + housing_schm_type uniquely identifies rows
quarter.quarter, net_wdl_amt: Correlation: Positive correlation observed between quarters and net_wdl_amt, indicating trends over time

housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type: Type: String; Meaning: Type of housing scheme, either 'Residential Properties Scheme' or 'Public Housing Scheme'
housing_schm_type.quarter, housing_schm_type: Composite key: quarter + housing_schm_type uniquely identifies rows
housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_wdl_amt for each housing_schm_type provides the total net withdrawal amount for that scheme type

net_wdl_amt.net_wdl_amt: Type: Integer; Meaning: Net withdrawal amount in the specified quarter for the given housing scheme type
net_wdl_amt.housing_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_wdl_amt for each housing_schm_type provides the total net withdrawal amount for that scheme type
net_wdl_amt.quarter, net_wdl_amt: Correlation: Positive correlation observed between quarters and net_wdl_amt, indicating trends over time

yr.yr: Type: Integer; Meaning: Year of the data entry
yr.yr, housing_schm_type: Composite key: yr + housing_schm_type uniquely identifies rows

housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type: Type: String; Meaning: Type of housing scheme (e.g., Residential Properties Scheme, Public Housing Scheme)
housing_schm_type.yr, housing_schm_type: Composite key: yr + housing_schm_type uniquely identifies rows
housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_wdl_amt for each housing_schm_type provides total withdrawals per scheme type

net_wdl_amt.housing_schm_type, net_wdl_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_wdl_amt for each housing_schm_type provides total withdrawals per scheme type

yr.yr: Type: Integer; Meaning: Year of the data record

gender.gender: Type: String; Meaning: Gender category

net_bal_amt.gender, net_bal_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_bal_amt can be rolled up by gender
net_bal_amt.yr, net_bal_amt: Aggregation constraint: Sum of net_bal_amt can be rolled up by yr

yr.yr: Type: Integer; Meaning: Year of the data entry
